title: A foldable and portable rear steer vehicle
abstract: The basic purpose of invention is minimizing human effort and eventually the time consumption for covering short distances The vehicle has at least three wheels, a rear steering mechanism and a braking system. The user can fold it and carry it as a trolley whenever needed and can be used as a vehicle by unfolding it. The front section (115) and the steering section (200) are joined to the middle section (100, 113) by hinges so they can be collapsed whenever needed. The collapsed vehicle forms a trolley in which front section acts as a handle (115) for the trolley. The rider stands over the middle section (100) to hold front section (115) with one hand and to hold steering section (200) with other hand to steer the vehicle. The vehicle uses external power source that could be an engine or a battery and motor.
claims: Claims ( 19 ) A foldable and portable rear steer vehicle comprises a chassis (100) mounted with a foldable steering system (200) at one end, and other end of said chassis (100) is mounted with a foldable handle (115) and connected to axle (119) mounted with wheels, wherein the vehicle is driven by atleast one powered driven wheel and the chassis (100) is connected to the axle (119) by territorially constraint relative motion means. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1, wherein said chassis (100) accommodating a battery (101) and is mounted with a controller connected between the battery (101) and electric hub motor (102) placed on steering fork (103) at one end of the chassis (100). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1 or 2, wherein the foldable steering system (200) includes a brake handle (105) hinged to a vertical member (106) rotatably mounted on a base (107), wherein the base (107) is fixedly secured on the chassis (100). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claims 1 -3, wherein a rotatable pipe mounting (107A) is provided in mesh with said mounting base (107) and is mounted with a fastener including bolt (108) for enabling sliding movement of the vertical member (106) therethrough by providing a slot (S) in the vertical member (106), in which the bolt rests in the slot (S). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claims 1-4, wherein the fastener constituting a lever (108) is connected to another lever (109) on the fork (103) by a connecting member (110) so as to maintain a ratio between the vertical member (106) and steering fork for precision in steering and to enable movement of vehicle in the direction of the steering. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-5, wherein the hinge connecting said handle bar (105) to said vertical member (106) is loaded with a tension spring with lock groves (111), which provides tension to keep the handle bar (105) in the desired position, in which free end of the handle (105) is having brake lever (105A). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-6, wherein the chassis (100) is having substantially U-section accommodating the battery (101) in between, which (100) is integrated to a part (113) having substantially triangular section at one end thereof forming a single structure, in which the triangular part (113) supports a charging point (114) for charging battery and caster spring (112) connecting said steering fork (103). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-7, wherein the handle (115) is fitted with a lock, and throttle (116) to control operation of the vehicle. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-8, wherein the handle (115) is telescopically fitted in base tubes (117) with the help of folding means including hinge, in which elastically compressible tube (117A) is provided inside the tube (117) and between the two tubes (117) and handle (115) so as to stop the play between the pipes and handle and also to provide proper resistance for mounting. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-9, wherein the handle (115) is attached to two mesh lock plates (118) facing each other and the chassis is fixedly secured to a stopper (T) at one end on both sides, which together with said mesh lock plates (118) help in locking the foldable vehicle in the form of trolley. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-10, wherein the axle (119) mounted with wheels is connected to the chassis (100) by two connecting means, one each side forming four link mechanism to bring roll center at a high position and for territorially constraint relative motion between axle and chassis, wherein the connecting means constitutes an assembly of fastener mounting (F1, F2) on axle and chassis respectively with faster (R) and links (L) therebetween. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 11, wherein the axle (119) is provided in connection with said chassis (100) with the help of a load spring (120) for territorially constraint relative motion between axle and chassis. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 11, wherein the axle (119) and chassis (100) are connected by an assembly of base plate (121), rubber bush (122) and rigid bushing (123) for territorially constraint relative motion between axle and chassis. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1 comprising of foldable front section (1) hingedly connected to middle section (2) forming chassis, which is provided in connection to steering section (3), wherein the chassis (2) is mounted with the foldable steering section (3) at one end, and other end of said chassis (2) is mounted with a foldable handle (20) and connected to axle (8) mounted with wheels, wherein said chassis (2) supports an engine (5) thereunder. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 14, wherein the handle (20) supports a brake lever (19) to provide braking control and is attached to a latch (18). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 14 or 15, wherein the steering section (3) includes a vertical pipe (12) connected to a handle pipe (15) by a hinge (10) loaded with a tension spring with lock groves to keep the handle pipe (15) in a fixed position, in which the handle pipe (15) is having a lock and throttle (17) at free end thereof. The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 16, wherein the pipe (12) has a fuel tank (13) and is connected to a pipe with two bearings (6) by a hinge (11), in which the pipe (6) is fitted to a hook (7). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 17, wherein the hinge (11) has a locking plate (14) by which the pipe (12) can be locked in the vertical position and by rotating plate (14) to the horizontal position, the pipe (12) is folded to the horizontal position, wherein the bearing is placed on a steering fork mounted with a wheel (16). The foldable and portable rear steer vehicle as claimed in claim 1-18, wherein the chassis (2, 100) may be mounted with a layer of foam (9) constituting a platform.
